output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?winner ?winnerLabel(xsd:int(SUBSTR(STR(?wonDate) , 1 , 4)) - xsd:int(SUBSTR(STR(?birthDate) , 1 , 4)) AS ?age) WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P31 wd:Q5525808 ; wdt:P1626 wd:Q103377 ; wdt:P585 ?wonDate ; wdt:P1346 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P569 ?birthDate ; wdt:P21 wd:Q6581097 .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(langMatches(lang(?winnerLabel) , "en"))
  FILTER(STR(?wonDate) >= "2013-01-01")
}
ORDER BY ?age
